title: ClawPilot Write Proposal Schema
description: Schema for a proposed MSX writeback operation. Write proposals are the ONLY mechanism for modifying CRM data and must always require explicit user approval.

record_type.description: The MSX record type being modified

record_id.description: The unique identifier of the record being modified

field_name.description: The specific field on the record being modified

current_value.description: The current value of the field (for diff display and conflict detection)

proposed_value.description: The new value being proposed for the field

evidence_source.description: Citation to the evidence justifying this change (email thread, transcript excerpt, data source)

must_require_approval.description: Always true. Write proposals are never auto-executed. This is a guardrail invariant.

confidence.description: How confident the system is that this change is correct based on evidence

rationale.description: Human-readable explanation of why this change is recommended

impact.description: Category of impact this write has on downstream processes
